name: ponytail
description: Lazy-senior-dev review/build discipline for AI coding agents.
usage: Type /ponytail in your agent to toggle modes.

claude.steps: Install per the instructions at https://github.com/DietrichGebert/ponytail (Claude Code setup section).

cursor.steps: Install per the instructions at https://github.com/DietrichGebert/ponytail (Cursor setup section).

gemini.steps: Install per the instructions at https://github.com/DietrichGebert/ponytail (Gemini setup section).
